headline: 2 Mega-Cap Stocks to Research Further and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Megacap stocks are behemoths that set the tone for their industries, and their massive scale typically leads to wide moats. However, the downside is that most have already exploited their existing market opportunities and must invest heavily to expand further, a risky proposition.

raw.headline: 2 Mega-Cap Stocks to Research Further and 1 Facing Challenges

headline: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: CHARLOTTE, N.C., April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. (NASDAQ: COKE) will issue a news release after the market closes on May 6, 2026 to announce its operating results for the first quarter ended April 3, 2026. CONTACTS: Brian K. headline: If You Bought Coca-Cola When Buffett Did, Here’s What You Have Today
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) is one of the most famous long-term investment stories in history, starting with Warren Buffett. Berkshire Hathaway began buying Coca-Cola shares in 1988, after the stock had been battered by the 1987 market crash and Coca-Cola had just completed the disastrous New Coke episode. Buffett saw a globally dominant brand with pricing ... If You Bought Coca-Cola When Buffett Did, Here’s What You Have Today
